s: App for monitoring the best-before date of products
d: NOTE: App is no longer developed, source repo has been archived. Features: * add, edit and remove products * save best-before date * search through products * data import and export Supported languages: * English * Czech * Danish * Dutch * Finnish * French * German * Hungarian * Polish * Portuguese (BR) * Spanish (AR) * Turkish * Ukrainian Wiki: You have questions, need help to set up the app or simply want to know more about it? Then take a look at the Wiki. Licensing: Licensed under the EUPL-1.2. OpenSource: This app is open source. Many thanks to all contributors. Icons: Icons by Google licensed under Apache License 2.0.
